overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a desert town with domed adobe architecture reminiscent of Tatooine. The character walks through sandy streets, interacts with a protocol droid and alien NPC, while a small creature companion follows. Bright midday sun creates harsh shadows on the sand-colored buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert town plaza with domed adobe structures

agents.ego_description: walking through the sandy plaza toward a group of NPCs, with a small lizard-like creature companion scurrying behind

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near the central domed building entrance
small creature companion running behind the main character

entered.detail: large sand-colored dome structure with weathered texture and small windows
central domed building with dark entrance and decorative spire
flat-roofed adobe structure with metal barrels stacked along the wall
tall thin metal tower with vanes visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit desert town plaza surrounded by large domed adobe buildings. The ground is sandy, and a few robed NPCs are scattered about. A small creature follows closely behind as the character approaches a central building.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza interaction area near adobe buildings with satellite equipment

events.description: character stops walking and turns to face a protocol droid and robed alien
character gestures with hands while conversing with the protocol droid

agents.ego_description: stopped to interact with a copper protocol droid and a green-skinned alien, gesturing with hands during conversation

notable_agents.action: green-skinned alien with tusks wearing brown robes standing still
copper-colored protocol droid gesturing with arms while facing the character

entered.detail: adobe building with large circular satellite dish mounted on the roof
group of cylindrical metal containers stacked near the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character stops and turns to face a copper protocol droid and a green-skinned alien. They stand in conversation while the camera focuses on the interaction. A satellite dish is visible on a building behind them, and the harsh desert sun casts strong shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow desert alley leading to large metal gate

events.description: character turns away from the droid and resumes walking through the town
moving from open plaza into narrow walled passage approaching the metal gate

agents.ego_description: walking away from the plaza through increasingly narrow streets toward a large metal gate, with the creature companion following behind

notable_agents.action: robed alien walking along the right wall in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall metal barred gate blocking the end of the passage with dust blowing around it
tall sand-colored adobe walls creating a narrow corridor
tall adobe walls with small windows and metal fixtures

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the interaction and enters a narrow alley between high adobe walls. The path leads toward a large metal gate at the far end. Dust blows across the sandy ground as the character approaches the gate, with the small creature companion keeping pace behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sun-drenched desert plaza that gradually narrows into a secluded adobe alleyway. It begins with the character walking across a sandy open square surrounded by large domed buildings, accompanied by a small creature. As the character reaches a central building, the camera pauses to focus on a conversation with a copper protocol droid and a green-skinned alien under the harsh midday sun. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from the interaction and enters a tight corridor between high adobe walls. Finally, the camera follows the pair through blowing dust toward a large metal gate at the far end of the passage.
